selections.name: Hard To Exceed
selections.reason: Peter Robl trained 2yo who looked professional winning a trial at Gold Coast. Draws the inside gate which is a massive advantage for a debutant at Doomben.

selections.name: Naughty Neil
selections.reason: Munce/Maloney combination. Won a trial at Deagon in good style. Drawn well to be competitive on debut.

selections.name: Yotei
selections.reason: Heathcote stable local runner. Won a Doomben trial recently. Barrier 4 gives him every chance to settle handy.

selections.name: Mishani Tango
selections.reason: Has the benefit of race experience, finishing 3rd on debut. That fitness edge counts for a lot in 2yo races.

danger_horse.name: Naughty Neil
danger_horse.reason: Trial win was sharp and stable has a good strike rate with juveniles.

selections.name: Tulong
selections.reason: Most consistent runner in the field with form reading 3-3-2. Beaten narrowly last start and this looks like his race to break through.

selections.name: Inside Passage
selections.reason: Kendrick stable runner who put in a solid 2nd two starts back. Drawn well and should be hitting the line hard.

selections.name: Rusty Tycoon
selections.reason: Heathcote runner who has been around the mark. 3rd two starts back at this track/distance is a good reference.

selections.name: Peak Miss
selections.reason: Improved effort to finish 3rd last start at Eagle Farm. Trending in the right direction.

danger_horse.name: Inside Passage
danger_horse.reason: Stable is firing and the horse has shown enough ability to win this weak maiden.

selections.name: Canara
selections.reason: Waller trained mare who ran a solid 3rd in a BM68 last start. Drops into a Class 1 here which is a significant grade drop in reality. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Explosive Power
selections.reason: Runner-up last start at Beaudesert. Draws perfectly in barrier 3 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Abraham
selections.reason: Broke maiden status last start at this track/distance. Confidence is up and can go on with it.

selections.name: Saveur
selections.reason: Another last start maiden winner. Waller stablemate to the top pick, must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Explosive Power
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and maps to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Cindersea
selections.reason: Michael Freedman raider who ran a huge 2nd in a BM70 last start. That form is superior to this Class 3 field. Looks the winner.

selections.name: Cordina
selections.reason: Vandyke trained mare coming off a win. Draws ideally in barrier 2 and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Just Precious
selections.reason: Kendrick runner drawn the rails. Grade drop from BM70 where she wasn't disgraced. Big watch.

selections.name: Jenchick Boom
selections.reason: Tony Gollan runner. Always dangerous in this grade at Doomben.

danger_horse.name: Cordina
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner from a premier stable with a perfect draw.

selections.name: True Amor
selections.reason: Drops significantly in grade from a BM78 where he finished 6th, only 3L off the winner. This is a Class 3. Massive class edge and draws well.

selections.name: Inca Trail
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but looked sharp winning a trial recently. Draws barrier 2 and maps well.

selections.name: Grammar Lad
selections.reason: Resuming for Schweida/Rodd. Trialled well and has ability.

selections.name: Extreme Spirit
selections.reason: Ran a solid 2nd last start. Fit and in form, though the barrier is sticky.

danger_horse.name: Inca Trail
danger_horse.reason: Trial form suggests he is ready to fire fresh.

selections.name: Hell To Pay
selections.reason: Coming off a win in BM70 grade. Tony Gollan trains, Jace McMurray claims 3kg which is crucial. The one to beat.

selections.name: Acappella Sun
selections.reason: Consistent mare who ran 4th in the same BM70 race as the top pick. Meets him better at the weights.

selections.name: Cho Oyu
selections.reason: Resuming. Has a very good fresh record (4:2-1-0). Barrier 4 allows him to settle.

selections.name: October
selections.reason: Solid performer in this grade. Will be running on.

danger_horse.name: Acappella Sun
danger_horse.reason: Weight swing in her favor vs the top pick makes her a serious threat.

selections.name: Delrico
selections.reason: Waller/Thornton combination. 7th last start but wasn't far away. Steps up to a suitable distance here.

selections.name: Laridae
selections.reason: Ran a close 2nd last start at this track/distance. In good form and maps well.

selections.name: Arizona Dreaming
selections.reason: Veteran who ran 2nd last start. Knows how to win but wide draw is a concern.

selections.name: Grey Northern
selections.reason: Consistent type who rarely runs a bad race. 3rd last start.

danger_horse.name: Laridae
danger_horse.reason: Proven form at the track and trip recently.

selections.name: Toro Strike
selections.reason: Drops from BM70 grade down to a 0-65. This is a massive drop in class. Despite the wide gate, his class should prevail.

selections.name: Bells Of Steel
selections.reason: Last start winner at this track. Vandyke stable is flying. Must be respected.

selections.name: Tomba
selections.reason: Drawn the rails (1). Consistent 3rd last start. Will get a soft run and be in the finish.

selections.name: Tam Na Ghar
selections.reason: Broke maiden last start. Progressive type who could measure up here.

danger_horse.name: Bells Of Steel
danger_horse.reason: Winning form is good form, and the stable is elite.
